rationale: The cited paper develops a core RFM-to-CLV framework for noncontractual customer settings, and the citing paper likewise studies noncontractual customer behavior with customer-level future cash-flow/value outcomes in a CRM/customer-equity context. This strong construct/domain overlap makes a substantive (foundational or methodological) connection plausible, so it is not safe to treat as an obvious mention-only citation from the current evidence.
